WHAT I DO

SERVICES

Flutter App Dev

Cross-platform mobile apps for Android & iOS with custom widgets, native integrations, and robust state management.

React Web Dev

Dynamic, fast, responsive web applications built with Next.js, modern CSS, and optimal client-side performance.

Full Stack Dev

End-to-end integration mapping frontend layouts to secure, scalable Node.js backends and Prisma ORM schemas.

MVP Development

Rapid prototyping and minimum viable product creation for early stage setups, converting Figma files to clean code.

SaaS Platforms

Multi-tenant platforms with user management, subscription billing (Stripe/Razorpay), and complex admin workspaces.

AWS & DevOps

Configuring containerized setups with Docker, Nginx reverse proxy, EC2 scaling, SSL setup, and CI/CD pipelines.

API Integration

Connecting WhatsApp Cloud API, payment processors, maps tracking systems, mail gateways, and automated webhook flow.

Maintenance

Legacy refactoring, database query optimizations, troubleshooting bottlenecks, and updating package dependencies.

Building high-performance Flutter apps & scalable full-stack systems. Clean code. Real results.
